description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from wills lifestyle. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Maroon textured wallet crafted from leather One main zippered compartment with 16 id card holder slots and a zippered pocket for coins and other essentials  Material and Care Leather Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size  Dimensions : 18.5 cm x 9.5 cm
